{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032316320482E097BE4122D733B8AE"}"},"total":2583},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7049849307461436167","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"啊啊啊啊真的好好看啊，事业文真的超级超级香这书写得也超级超级爽！这不比搞情情爱爱的看着让人舒爽多了？自强才是根本！看着就让人开心心情愉悦啊！！！！就是太少了，哎，突然觉得我要是晚一点发现是不是就会多点章节？但是这么好看的书万一错过了就好可惜啊！！不需要什么勾心斗角的情节，真的好轻松！我爱了，作者大大辛苦了，作者大大多更点～爱你爱你木嘛木嘛～"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1641420961,"group_id":"7036703733178174497","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"绿茶白莲做精坏人渣渣极品贱人麻烦都直接去s好吗？真的恶心🤢","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2dwSR1e8VcicpU81Iq76L4=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e4d9f12ca601444b8b4d02c08f5b463f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789827&x-signature=iK0vvHarsyruU9JI78FVNcUSFRk%3D","user_id":"99259283930","user_name":"极与极🥀"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"99259283930","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1777231862,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E8EEFF","can_worn":false,"id":9,"name":"守护者","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9bfd769bf7c1205b6bb2f351783fe88c","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/05d4b00798f1b51b8642604fba4b0ac9"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7036703733178174497","book_info":{"abstract":"【无cp+经商种田+基建+女强+爽文】
竹凌在时空局快乐的咸鱼了一百年……然后，欠了六个亿巨债！为了还债，她被迫绑定了“催债系统”，开始辛酸还钱路。
于是，紫霄国诞生了一位传奇女首富。传说她卖豆腐起家，靠魔芋暴富，随后公园、超市、连锁酒店，女子学院、女子工厂如雨后春笋般冒出来……无数商人富贾从四面八方赶来，企图搭上她这条大船。
然而，她最厉害的成就，却是办了一家妇联！
当贫寒的农家女子认字识数，成为人人羡慕的管事娘子；
当柔弱的青楼少女脱离苦海，成为雷厉风行的商行掌事；
当惊才绝艳的公主干掉草包太子，成为紫霄国第一女帝！
当白素贞不再执着于以身相许，当黛玉成为国民才女，当探春入朝为官……
当女子可以走出家门堂堂正正的赚钱，当她们可以读书识字、科举当官，当帝位不再为男权垄断——
封建社会的女性崛起了，她们一起顶起了妇女的半边天！
（避雷：爽文！不虐不拖拉！全文宗旨为提高女性地位，维护世界和平。无男主，不搞爱情；前期主经商，后期基建权谋，纯事业文，女主无金手指，无武力值，全靠脑子发家致富；系统除了催债和嗑瓜子毫无作用，非辅助系统，不要对统子有任何期待！）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o9c990593746df26bf7acc405fed3d54d~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"珍馐美馔","author_id":"","book_id":"7036703733178174497","book_name":"欠系统六个亿，我靠种田爆富了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0e898","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5622人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":23,"name":"种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=23&name=种田&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":86,"name":"女强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=86&name=女强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":828,"name":"基建","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828&name=基建&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7036707223048978976","read_count":"5622","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"734509"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"310","tags":"种田,古代言情,系统,穿越,女强,无CP,基建","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/8e2880756b5d296ad23678d8f1482060~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779438724&x-signature=5kATKkx2RRirDCkTSKOyW%2BSLTBc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"107764951974","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.1969803e+07"},"log_extra":{" ,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1651468357,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7036703733178174497","book_info":{"abstract":"【无cp+经商种田+基建+女强+爽文】
竹凌在时空局快乐的咸鱼了一百年……然后，欠了六个亿巨债！为了还债，她被迫绑定了“催债系统”，开始辛酸还钱路。
于是，紫霄国诞生了一位传奇女首富。传说她卖豆腐起家，靠魔芋暴富，随后公园、超市、连锁酒店，女子学院、女子工厂如雨后春笋般冒出来……无数商人富贾从四面八方赶来，企图搭上她这条大船。
然而，她最厉害的成就，却是办了一家妇联！
当贫寒的农家女子认字识数，成为人人羡慕的管事娘子；
当柔弱的青楼少女脱离苦海，成为雷厉风行的商行掌事；
当惊才绝艳的公主干掉草包太子，成为紫霄国第一女帝！
当白素贞不再执着于以身相许，当黛玉成为国民才女，当探春入朝为官……
当女子可以走出家门堂堂正正的赚钱，当她们可以读书识字、科举当官，当帝位不再为男权垄断——
封建社会的女性崛起了，她们一起顶起了妇女的半边天！
（避雷：爽文！不虐不拖拉！全文宗旨为提高女性地位，维护世界和平。无男主，不搞爱情；前期主经商，后期基建权谋，纯事业文，女主无金手指，无武力值，全靠脑子发家致富；系统除了催债和嗑瓜子毫无作用，非辅助系统，不要对统子有任何期待！）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o9c990593746df26bf7acc405fed3d54d~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"珍馐美馔","author_id":"","book_id":"7036703733178174497","book_name":"欠系统六个亿，我靠种田爆富了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0e898","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5622人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":23,"name":"种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=23&name=种田&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":86,"name":"女强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=86&name=女强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":828,"name":"基建","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828&name=基建&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7036707223048978976","read_count":"5622","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"734509"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"310","tags":"种田,古代言情,系统,穿越,女强,无CP,基建","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/8e2880756b5d296ad23678d8f1482060~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779438724&x-signature=5kATKkx2RRirDCkTSKOyW%2BSLTBc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"107764951974","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"7.7843896e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032316320482E097BE4122D733B8AE"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读42小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":33,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":73530,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":151373,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":36721},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1647093080,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7049271031399203620","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常喜欢，一看作者就是查了资料的，看着就很舒服，不会出现一些非常不合理的地方，看的时候还得告诉自己这是小说不要计较太多，光凭这点作者大大就值得一个五星好评！更爱的是作者的三观，对于女主父母方面作者说的跟我的看法很像，爱了爱了。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1641286314,"group_id":"7036703733178174497","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyKzaraWL8XQJiliwmB+eEde4UDE+JNm6PLnibDXocNl","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/9ae3071624a04c658c57d7e41cb3a754~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795687&x-signature=TDH%2BjHWCiEw5HDbZ1zhrzJ%2BCOoI%3D","user_id":"2436121432962567","user_name":"救救小鹿"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2436121432962567","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7036703733178174497","book_info":{"abstract":"【无cp+经商种田+基建+女强+爽文】
竹凌在时空局快乐的咸鱼了一百年……然后，欠了六个亿巨债！为了还债，她被迫绑定了“催债系统”，开始辛酸还钱路。
于是，紫霄国诞生了一位传奇女首富。传说她卖豆腐起家，靠魔芋暴富，随后公园、超市、连锁酒店，女子学院、女子工厂如雨后春笋般冒出来……无数商人富贾从四面八方赶来，企图搭上她这条大船。
然而，她最厉害的成就，却是办了一家妇联！
当贫寒的农家女子认字识数，成为人人羡慕的管事娘子；
当柔弱的青楼少女脱离苦海，成为雷厉风行的商行掌事；
当惊才绝艳的公主干掉草包太子，成为紫霄国第一女帝！
当白素贞不再执着于以身相许，当黛玉成为国民才女，当探春入朝为官……
当女子可以走出家门堂堂正正的赚钱，当她们可以读书识字、科举当官，当帝位不再为男权垄断——
封建社会的女性崛起了，她们一起顶起了妇女的半边天！
（避雷：爽文！不虐不拖拉！全文宗旨为提高女性地位，维护世界和平。无男主，不搞爱情；前期主经商，后期基建权谋，纯事业文，女主无金手指，无武力值，全靠脑子发家致富；系统除了催债和嗑瓜子毫无作用，非辅助系统，不要对统子有任何期待！）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o9c990593746df26bf7acc405fed3d54d~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"珍馐美馔","author_id":"","book_id":"7036703733178174497","book_name":"欠系统六个亿，我靠种田爆富了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0e898","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5622人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":23,"name":"种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=23&name=种田&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":86,"name":"女强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=86&name=女强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":828,"name":"基建","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828&name=基建&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7036707223048978976","read_count":"5622","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"734509"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"310","tags":"种田,古代言情,系统,穿越,女强,无CP,基建","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/8e2880756b5d296ad23678d8f1482060~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779438724&x-signature=5kATKkx2RRirDCkTSKOyW%2BSLTBc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"107764951974","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2.177745e+06"},"log_extra":{"r
